diagnosis: The player spent ~21 seconds idle at spawn before moving, then traversed a long horizontal corridor with repetitive platform-enemy clusters. They died three times to combat (x≈2600–3660) and eventually quit without reaching the exit. The level is ~400 tiles wide with almost no elevation change, no checkpoints, and enemies placed on the mandatory path at high density, creating a grind that overwhelms the player.

lessons.lesson: Long horizontal corridors without checkpoints amplify enemy density into a difficulty spike; each death resets the entire traversal, turning a manageable challenge into a war of attrition.
conditions: no mid-level checkpoints or safe zones
enemy density is high on the critical path
lessons.outcome: player dies repeatedly, loses all progress on each death, and quits before reaching the exit
